'''Mathieu Cozza''' (born 12 April 2000) is a French [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|pr}} or {{rlp|lf}} for the [[Huddersfield Giants]] in the [[Super League]].

==Playing career==
===Catalans Dragons===
In 2021 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against the [[Salford Red Devils]].

===Barrow Raiders (loan)===
On 8 June 2022, it was reported that he had joined [[Barrow Raiders|Barrow]] on 28-day loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=NW Mail|date=8 Jun 2022|accessdate=26 Oct 2023|title=Barrow Raiders announce loan signing of Mathieu Cozza|url=https://www.nwemail.co.uk/news/20195708.barrow-raiders-announce-loan-signing-mathieu-cozza/}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers===
On 19 October 2022, it was reported that he had signed for [[Featherstone Rovers]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=19 Oct 2022|accessdate=26 Oct 2023|title=Featherstone Rovers snap up Catalans Dragons forward|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/featherstone-rovers-snap-up-catalans-dragons-forward}}</ref>

===Wakefield Trinity===
On 26 October 2023, it was reported that he signed for [[Wakefield Trinity]] ahead of the 2024 RFL Championship season.<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=26 Oct 2023|title=Wakefield Trinity make second signing in as many days as Daryl Powell brings in former Catalans Dragons and Featherstone Rovers man Mathieu Cozza|url=https://www.totalrl.com/wakefield-trinity-make-second-signing-in-as-many-days-as-daryl-powell-brings-in-former-catalans-dragons-and-featherstone-rovers-man-mathieu-cozza/}}</ref>

== International ==
He made his début on 29 April 2023 in the 64–0 defeat to {{rlnt|England}} at the [[Halliwell Jones Stadium]].{{citation needed|date=January 2024}}
